root_cause: A deploy for catalog-service at 09:12 introduced a rendering bug that caused 5xx errors on search and product detail pages starting at 09:15.
key_evidence: Deploy event at 09:12 for catalog-service (commit d4e9b12, feat: redesign product card rendering)
ERROR logs showing TemplateRenderException starting at 09:15
Error rate spike from <0.5% to ~15% at 09:15, coinciding with the deploy
No configuration changes or unhealthy dependencies
expected_mitigations: Rollback the deploy to the previous version immediately
Fix the rendering bug in the product card template and redeploy after testing
notes: The 3-minute gap between deploy and errors is the primary causal signal. Config diff and dependencies must both be clean for a confident deploy_related diagnosis.
